improvements.improvement: When a workflow must be disabled by default, prefer a repository-variable gate (e.g., vars.CI_ENABLED == 'true') over hardcoded if:false, and document enablement steps in-line.
In GitHub Actions, use python -m pip commands (including pip upgrade) to ensure interpreter-aligned package installation.
Require generated workflow steps to remain runnable under an explicit toggle so criteria like test execution and coverage visibility can be validated without code edits.
